prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (64mm compressor, 88mm turbine) paired with a **BorgWarner EFR 9280** wastegate actuator for the **6.0L twin-turbo W12 (LJ71)** engine, targeting 850whp on **100-octane fuel** with a **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system (replacing the stock Bosch MED17.1.1) for precise boost control and ignition timing

Install **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression)** with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** and a **Carrillo crankshaft** to handle the increased cylinder pressures, paired with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** and **Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves** for the W12’s 48-valve heads

Replace the stock **ZF 8HP90X** transmission with a **Liberty Walk x PRL Motorsports reinforced 8-speed automatic** featuring a **PRL billet torque converter (4,500 RPM stall)** and **South Bend twin-disc clutch pack** for launch control, paired with a **Quaife ATB differential** and **Brembo GT-R 390mm 6-piston front calipers** with **Pagid RS29 brake pads** for repeated high-speed deceleration
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny x Liberty Walk widebody kit (Type 3)** for the Continental GT Speed, featuring **carbon fiber fenders (2.5-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear)**, **custom 3D-printed ABS overfenders**, and **aluminum reinforcement plates** to maintain chassis rigidity, finished in **Matte Obsidian Black (Bentley Paintshop code: 90001)**

Replace the stock **Bentley matrix grille** with a **Vorsteiner V-Stream carbon fiber grille** (hand-laid 2x2 twill weave) and install **Seibon carbon fiber hood (with integrated NACA ducts)** to feed the **Garrett turbochargers**, paired with **OEM+ LED headlight housings (Lux H8 V4S bulbs)** and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights**

Lower the car with **KW Suspension Variant 5 coilovers (3-way adjustable, 40mm drop)** featuring **monotube dampers** and **helper springs**, paired with **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (22x10.5 ET35 front, 22x12.5 ET45 rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30R22 front, 325/25R22 rear)** for track-focused grip
